changes_made: Replaced original generic RSS/voice skill with task-focused structured skill

Added article summarization template with topic mapping (Energy/Technology/Transportation/Business)

Added concurrent feed fetching pattern with background processes for multi-feed task
Added explicit JSON output schemas for all 3 task types
Removed voice/TTS, emoji formatting, and irrelevant content
